Home / Our Scholars

Meet Our 2025 BECE Scholars

Celebrating exceptional achievement, faith-driven excellence, and the bright future leaders of Al-Ameen Integrated College.

Why Choose Al-Ameen

Results That Speak for Themselves

Our 2025 BECE results prove what happens when dedicated students, committed teachers, and Islamic values come together. Here is why parents choose Al-Ameen.

🏆

Proven Academic Results

Our 2025 BECE class produced 5 students with perfect 10 A grades, multiple 9-A achievers, and a 100% pass rate.

🕌

Faith-Centred Education

Al-Qur'an and Sunnah are woven into every aspect of school life, building children of character and purpose.

👨‍👩‍👧

Personalised Attention

Small class sizes and dedicated teachers ensure every child gets the individual support they deserve.

📚

Dual Curriculum

From Crèche to SS3, we offer National and International Curriculum, preparing students to compete locally and globally.

🔨

Vocational & Life Skills

Students gain practical skills in tailoring, entrepreneurship and crafts — equipping them for a self-sufficient life.

🌟

Your Child Could Be Next

Join the growing community of families who have chosen excellence, faith, and the future.
